name: RMG ML Sports Holdings
business: RMG ML Sports Holdings is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a business combination. It intends to focus on opportunities in the global sports industry and adjacent sectors including entertainment, eSports, gaming, music publishing, and real estate development focused on stadiums and venues. The company has not identified any potential business combination target.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus our efforts on opportunities in the global sports industry and adjacent sectors including, but not limited to, entertainment, eSports, gaming, music publishing and real estate development (focused on stadiums and venues).

tamClaims.claim: The global sports industry has anticipated future growth of 8% per year through 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Kearney’s 2025 report ( From passion to profit: unlocking value in sports ), the global sports industry has continued to evolve into a dynamic business environment driven by value creation with anticipated future growth of 8% per year through 2030.

tamClaims.claim: We expect a robust flow of opportunities ranging from $1.0 billion to $4.0 billion in enterprise value.
tamClaims.sentence: We expect these networks will provide us with a robust flow of opportunities ranging from $1.0 billion and $4.0 billion in enterprise value.
